case_title: BRYAN WILLIAM SOUZA VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) BRIAN CAULEY, ASSISTANT CHIEF OF CLAIMS FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,638.00 FILED BY SOUZA, BRYAN WILLIAM AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-23-2020 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF BRYAN WILLIAM SOUZA. DEFENDANT CCSF, REPRESENTED BY BRIAN CAULEY, ASSISTANT CHIEF OF CLAIMS, IS PRESENT AND WAIVES SERVICE. PLAINTIFF IS NOT PRESENT IN COURT AT 8:40 A.M. AND DEFENDANT IS DISMISSED FROM COURT. COMMISSIONER PANG LY; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-29-2020 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO OCT-28-2020 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. R. SAHATJIAN (506)
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF.
